name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America at 140 Southmore Ave in Pasadena, TX provides quick payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America's Pasadena, TX location at 140 Southmore Ave serves the surrounding community with accessible short-term lending solutions. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM, and Saturdays from 10AM to 3PM, providing convenient hours for Pasadena residents. This standalone location makes it easy to walk in and start your application.

At this Pasadena store, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and check cashing services. Call +1 713-589-1131 to speak with a lending specialist about your options, get a pre-approval estimate, or learn what documents you'll need to bring.

If you're a Pasadena resident facing an unexpected expense, this Advance America location provides a straightforward alternative to traditional banks. Bring a valid government ID, recent pay stub, and information about your bank account to complete your application faster. The branch has handled countless loan applications for people in the Pasadena area.
pros: Same-day loan funding available for payday and installment loans
High customer satisfaction with 4.9/5 star rating across 125,497 reviews
Offers title loans up to $25,000, providing larger loan amounts than payday-only lenders
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone pre-qualification
Longer repayment terms for installment loans compared to standard payday products
Western Union services available at physical locations
cons: Payday loans limited to $100-$500, requiring customers to seek installment or title loans for larger needs
Title loans require vehicle ownership and paid-off status, creating barriers for customers without qualifying collateral
Website does not disclose APR or cost information, making it difficult to compare true borrowing costs upfront
Installment loans still carry typical short-term lending costs not transparent on the product pages
Limited store hours (closes at 4pm on Saturday, closed Sundays) may inconvenience some borrowers
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$1,000 in emergency cash between paychecks with stable income
Vehicle owners seeking larger loans ($2,000-$25,000) against paid-off car titles
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Jacksonville area seeking bilingual loan services
People unable to qualify for traditional bank loans and needing same-day funding
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers in immediate financial distress who need $100-$25,000 within 24 hours and have steady income or vehicle collateral. The primary caveat is that emergency cash loans carry substantially higher costs than traditional lending products—consumers should only use these services for genuine emergencies and must understand the true cost of borrowing before committing, as APR and fee information is not prominently displayed on the website.
services: Same-day funding for payday and installment loans
Multiple payment plan options for installment products

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 140 Southmore Ave, Pasadena, TX. Fast payday loans and title loans.
